leave_application.title: How to take Leave in ERP

steps.text: Login to the ERP portal: http://103.205.135.34/acmeerp/ using your employee credentials.
Navigate to the Top Right corner and click on your profile module.
From the dropdown, click on 'Apply Leave' option.
Choose Start date, End date and Leave type.
Enter the duration for leave (full-day / Half-day) and describe the reason for leave clearly
choose your supervisor/teamlead for pass over the duties from the dropdown and write note (if any). Then Submit the application.
After applying leave in ERP, you have to send a manual email to your supervisor also.
Login to ERP and go to 'Attendance' module.
Select the date you need to regularize.
Enter the correct in-time and out-time.
Provide reason and submit for approval.
